input: user-item interaction graph and side information graphs (multi-relational graphs for users and items)
output: user and item embeddings for downstream recommendation
backbone: multi-graph neural network (pre-training) + any representation-based recommender (e.g., MF, NCF, NGCF, LightGCN) for fine-tuning
loss: pre-training: graph reconstruction or link prediction loss (not explicitly stated); fine-tuning: BPR or cross-entropy (depends on base model)
key_idea: pre-train entity embeddings on side information graphs using multi-graph neural networks, then fine-tune with a base recommender
